title: Techflare - Chrome Web Store
excerpt: Detect Cloudflare products and related web technologies using private, local browser signals.
content_html:
Overview

Detect Cloudflare products and related web technologies using private, local browser signals.

Techflare is a privacy-first developer tool that identifies browser-visible Cloudflare products used by websites. Open a website and click the Techflare toolbar button. The icon turns orange when at least one confirmed signal is found. The popup lists detected products, explains the evidence behind each result, and provides links to official documentation. Detectable products include: - Cloudflare Network and CDN Cache - Images and Stream - Turnstile, Access, and Bot Protection - Web Analytics and Zaraz - Pages, Workers, and R2 on official Cloudflare service hostnames - Waiting Room, Load Balancing, Rate Limiting, and Always Online Privacy by design: - Detection runs entirely inside the extension - No account, telemetry, analytics, DNS lookup, or server upload - No browsing data leaves your device - Results are retained only for the current browser session - Cookie values, query strings, Ray IDs, signed media tokens, and full resource URLs are never stored As pages load, Techflare observes requested hostnames, selected response-header presence, canonical DOM markers, and a small allowlist of Cloudflare cookie names. It does not store cookie values or page content. Techflare reports only documented, product-specific signals visible to a browser. “Not detected” does not mean that a product is disabled. Services that cannot be reliably identified—including WAF, DDoS protection, Argo, Tunnel, API Shield, and custom-domain Workers, Pages, or R2 deployments—are intentionally not guessed. Techflare uses an original icon and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Cloudflare, Inc. Built by Listen Notes.

Privacy

Manage extensions and learn how they're being used in your organization

Techflare has disclosed the following information regarding the collection and usage of your data. More detailed information can be found in the developer's privacy policy.

Techflare handles the following:

Web history

Website content

This developer declares that your data is

  • Not being sold to third parties, outside of the approved use cases
  • Not being used or transferred for purposes that are unrelated to the item's core functionality
  • Not being used or transferred to determine creditworthiness or for lending purposes

blocks.html_en: Detect Cloudflare products and related web technologies using private, local browser signals.

sentences.en: Detect Cloudflare products and related web technologies using private, local browser signals.
sentences.zh: 使用私有本地浏览器信号检测 Cloudflare 产品和相关 Web 技术。

blocks.html_en: Techflare is a privacy-first developer tool that identifies browser-visible Cloudflare products used by websites. Open a website and click the Techflare toolbar button. The icon turns orange when at least one confirmed signal is found. The popup lists detected products, explains the evidence behind each result, and provides links to official documentation. Detectable products include: - Cloudflare Network and CDN Cache - Images and Stream - Turnstile, Access, and Bot Protection - Web Analytics and Zaraz - Pages, Workers, and R2 on official Cloudflare service hostnames - Waiting Room, Load Balancing, Rate Limiting, and Always Online Privacy by design: - Detection runs entirely inside the extension - No account, telemetry, analytics, DNS lookup, or server upload - No browsing data leaves your device - Results are retained only for the current browser session - Cookie values, query strings, Ray IDs, signed media tokens, and full resource URLs are never stored As pages load, Techflare observes requested hostnames, selected response-header presence, canonical DOM markers, and a small allowlist of Cloudflare cookie names. It does not store cookie values or page content. Techflare reports only documented, product-specific signals visible to a browser. “Not detected” does not mean that a product is disabled. Services that cannot be reliably identified—including WAF, DDoS protection, Argo, Tunnel, API Shield, and custom-domain Workers, Pages, or R2 deployments—are intentionally not guessed. Techflare uses an original icon and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Cloudflare, Inc. Built by Listen Notes.

sentences.en: Techflare is a privacy-first developer tool that identifies browser-visible Cloudflare products used by websites.
sentences.zh: Techflare 是一种隐私优先的开发者工具，可识别网站使用的浏览器可见的 Cloudflare 产品。

sentences.en: Open a website and click the Techflare toolbar button.
sentences.zh: 打开网站并单击 Techflare 工具栏按钮。

sentences.en: The icon turns orange when at least one confirmed signal is found.
sentences.zh: 当至少发现一个确认信号时，图标变为橙色。

sentences.en: The popup lists detected products, explains the evidence behind each result, and provides links to official documentation.
sentences.zh: 弹出窗口列出了检测到的产品，解释了每个结果背后的证据，并提供了官方文档的链接。

sentences.en: Detectable products include: - Cloudflare Network and CDN Cache - Images and Stream - Turnstile, Access, and Bot Protection - Web Analytics and Zaraz - Pages, Workers, and R2 on official Cloudflare service hostnames - Waiting Room, Load Balancing, Rate Limiting, and Always Online Privacy by design: - Detection runs entirely inside the extension - No account, telemetry, analytics, DNS lookup, or server upload - No browsing data leaves your device - Results are retained only for the current browser session - Cookie values, query strings, Ray IDs, signed media tokens, and full resource URLs are never stored As pages load, Techflare observes requested hostnames, selected response-header presence, canonical DOM markers, and a small allowlist of Cloudflare cookie names.
sentences.zh: 可检测的产品包括： - Cloudflare 网络和 CDN 缓存 - 图像和流 - Turnstile、访问和机器人防护 - Web Analytics 和 Zaraz - 官方 Cloudflare 服务主机名上的页面、Workers 和 R2 - 等候室、负载平衡、速率限制和始终在线设计隐私： - 检测完全在扩展程序内运行 - 没有帐户、遥测、分析、DNS 查找或服务器上传 - 没有浏览数据离开您的设备 - 结果仅保留当前浏览器会话 - Cookie 值、查询字符串、Ray ID、签名媒体令牌和完整资源 URL 永远不会存储。当页面加载时，Techflare 会观察请求的主机名、选定的响应标头存在、规范 DOM 标记以及一小部分 Cloudflare Cookie 名称白名单。

sentences.en: It does not store cookie values or page content.
sentences.zh: 它不存储 cookie 值或页面内容。

sentences.en: Techflare reports only documented, product-specific signals visible to a browser.
sentences.zh: Techflare 仅报告浏览器可见的记录的、特定于产品的信号。

sentences.en: “Not detected” does not mean that a product is disabled.
sentences.zh: “未检测到”并不意味着产品已被禁用。

sentences.en: Services that cannot be reliably identified—including WAF, DDoS protection, Argo, Tunnel, API Shield, and custom-domain Workers, Pages, or R2 deployments—are intentionally not guessed.
sentences.zh: 无法可靠识别的服务（包括 WAF、DDoS 保护、Argo、Tunnel、API Shield 和自定义域 Workers、Pages 或 R2 部署）有意不被猜测。

sentences.en: Techflare uses an original icon and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Cloudflare, Inc. Built by Listen Notes.
sentences.zh: Techflare 使用原创图标，不隶属于 Cloudflare, Inc.，也不受其认可或赞助。由 Listen Notes 构建。

blocks.html_en: 4.4
Lighthouse is an open-source, automated tool for improving the performance, quality, and correctness of your web apps.

sentences.en: Lighthouse is an open-source, automated tool for improving the performance, quality, and correctness of your web apps.
sentences.zh: Lighthouse 是一款开源自动化工具，用于提高 Web 应用程序的性能、质量和正确性。

content_html_zh:
概述

使用私有本地浏览器信号检测 Cloudflare 产品和相关 Web 技术。

Techflare 是一种隐私优先的开发者工具，可识别网站使用的浏览器可见的 Cloudflare 产品。 打开网站并单击 Techflare 工具栏按钮。 当至少发现一个确认信号时，图标变为橙色。 弹出窗口列出了检测到的产品，解释了每个结果背后的证据，并提供了官方文档的链接。 可检测的产品包括： - Cloudflare 网络和 CDN 缓存 - 图像和流 - Turnstile、访问和机器人防护 - Web Analytics 和 Zaraz - 官方 Cloudflare 服务主机名上的页面、Workers 和 R2 - 等候室、负载平衡、速率限制和始终在线设计隐私： - 检测完全在扩展程序内运行 - 没有帐户、遥测、分析、DNS 查找或服务器上传 - 没有浏览数据离开您的设备 - 结果仅保留当前浏览器会话 - Cookie 值、查询字符串、Ray ID、签名媒体令牌和完整资源 URL 永远不会存储。当页面加载时，Techflare 会观察请求的主机名、选定的响应标头存在、规范 DOM 标记以及一小部分 Cloudflare Cookie 名称白名单。 它不存储 cookie 值或页面内容。 Techflare 仅报告浏览器可见的记录的、特定于产品的信号。 “未检测到”并不意味着产品已被禁用。 无法可靠识别的服务（包括 WAF、DDoS 保护、Argo、Tunnel、API Shield 和自定义域 Workers、Pages 或 R2 部署）有意不被猜测。 Techflare 使用原创图标，不隶属于 Cloudflare, Inc.，也不受其认可或赞助。由 Listen Notes 构建。

隐私

管理扩展程序并了解它们在您的组织中的使用情况

Techflare 披露了以下有关收集和使用您的数据的信息。 更详细的信息可以在开发商的隐私政策中找到。

Techflare 处理以下内容：

网络历史记录

网站内容

该开发者声明您的数据是

  • 不出售给经批准的用例之外的第三方
  • 不被使用或转让用于与项目核心功能无关的目的
  • 不被用于或转让以确定信誉或用于贷款目的
